The image depicts a scene from a video game. The primary vehicle is a yellow bus with a blue stripe running along its side. The bus is traveling down a road, which is marked by a dashed white line on the road. The road is bordered by a gray road surface.

There are two people visible in the scene. One person is standing on the left side of the road, wearing a blue shirt. The other person is standing on the right side of the road, wearing a green shirt. Both individuals are facing the same direction, likely towards the bus.

The environment appears to be a suburban or suburban-like setting, with houses and trees visible in the background. The sky is not visible in the image, but it is likely daytime due to the visibility of the road
